nodes.name: ServiceTitan Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives webhook events from ServiceTitan. Configure in ServiceTitan > Settings > Integrations > Webhooks. Events: job.scheduled, job.dispatched, job.completed, job.cancelled, customer.created, estimate.sent, invoice.created, payment.received

nodes.name: Normalize ServiceTitan Event
nodes.notes: Maps ServiceTitan job/customer/payment events to GL365 journal format. Extracts customer phone, email, name, job details, technician info.

parameters.name: messages
parameters.value: =[{"role":"user","content":"Write ONE concise sentence for a service business CRM journal. Be specific with names, dates, amounts. ServiceTitan event: {{$json.event_type}}. Customer: {{$json.contact_name}}. Job type: {{$json.job_type}}. Technician: {{$json.technician}}. Address: {{$json.job_address}}. Total: {{$json.job_total}}. Job ID: {{$json.job_id}}. Raw: {{$json.raw_summary}}"}]

nodes.name: AI Summary
nodes.notes: Generates context-rich summary including technician name, job type, and address.
